mapper.sql: select ds.duty_id, ds.student_id, s.name as student_name, s.gender, s.phone as student_phone, ds.venue_id, ds.start_time, ds.end_time, ds.remark, ds.attendance_status, ds.created_at, ds.updated_at from duty_schedule ds left join student s on ds.student_id = s.student_id

select ds.duty_id, ds.student_id, s.name as student_name, s.gender, s.phone as student_phone, ds.venue_id, v.venue_name, ds.start_time, ds.end_time, ds.remark, ds.attendance_status, ds.created_at, ds.updated_at, ar.record_id, ar.check_in_time, ar.check_out_time from duty_schedule ds left join student s on ds.student_id = s.student_id left join venue v on ds.venue_id = v.venue_id left join attendance_record ar on ar.record_id = ( select ar2.record_id from attendance_record ar2 where ar2.duty_id = ds.duty_id and ar2.student_id = ds.student_id order by ar2.record_id desc limit 1 )
mapper.select: where ds.student_id = #{studentId} order by ds.start_time desc
where ds.venue_id = #{venueId} order by ds.start_time desc
mapper.insert: insert into duty_schedule (student_id, venue_id, start_time, end_time, remark) values (#{studentId}, #{venueId}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{remark})
mapper.update: update duty_schedule set student_id = #{studentId}, venue_id = #{venueId}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime}, remark = #{remark}, attendance_status = #{attendanceStatus} where duty_id = #{dutyId}
